title: Fix chat history loading TODO
description: Re-enable and improve the chat history loading logic in use-realtime-chat-history.ts by implementing smarter timing for clearing the realtime buffer. The current code has a TODO to re-enable the cleanup of the realtime buffer with smarter timing (only after history confirms the message). This change modifies the cleanup effect to wait for stream to end, then wait 2 seconds, and ensure the last realtime message is not a streaming message.

title: Enhance error handling in gateway components
description: Add proper error boundaries and fallback UI for gateway components to prevent crashes and improve user experience when API calls fail.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
description: Implement keyboard shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+K for search, Ctrl+N for new chat) across the workspace to improve accessibility and power user experience.
